Roast Setup

Behmor Settings

KKTO Actions

Audio Analyzer & Timeline

00:00
DTR --
Status: Ready
RoR --
Overlays a past roast's curve and warns ~10s before its cracks.
Detection Settings
Lower = more sensitive (detects quieter snaps); higher = ignores faint noise.
How many snaps within 5s are needed before a crack phase is declared.
High-frequency energy share above which cracking is read as second crack. Lower = detects 2nd crack more readily.
Roast Targets (alarms)

Get a beep + notification when the roast reaches a target. Leave blank or 0 to disable.

Roast Curve (audio energy over time)

Timeline & Logs

Roast History

Data Backup

All beans and roasts are stored only in this browser. Export a backup to keep them safe.
